{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Dross’ spirit
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] projected [[Dross]]' internal structure into the air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
